calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Patrick Heard, #11055.
Petitioner, Denise Chen, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Denise L Lee.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
